title: mChatAI Fundamental Category Manifest
description: Schema for content/{category}/manifest.json files. Defined by docs/MCHATAI_FUNDAMENTALS.md §7. Ship 2026-05-14 as part of the §12 schema-gate resolution.

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Bump only on contract-breaking changes (spec §9).

category.description: Kebab-case category id. Must match the parent directory name in content/<category>/.

_notes.description: Optional free-form notes for maintainers. Ignored at runtime.

id.description: Kebab-case id, globally unique WITHIN the category (spec §7 field rules).

summary.description: One-line description shown in the autoload catalog + MCP list_fundamentals.

language.description: BCP-47 language code, or 'multi' for multi-language content.

files.description: Content file basenames (relative to content/<category>/). First entry is the primary file.

size_bytes.description: Approximate uncompressed size of the primary file. Used for autoload catalog size_kb.

surfaces.description: Map of surface intent → identifier. Known keys: mcp_tool, prompt_token, skill_namespace, runtime_global, native_swift, wisdom_resource. Unknown keys pass through.

fallback_bundled.description: True if a copy of the primary file ships in Resources/MchataiContent/<category>/ for offline first-launch. Set false for content too large to bundle (>1MB rule of thumb) — diagFundamentals will surface it under unbundledIDs.

fallback_bundled_note.description: Optional explanation when fallback_bundled is false — keeps the deliberate-omission obvious to QA agents reading the manifest.

deprecated.description: When true, accessors emit warnings on use. Per spec §9, remove after 2 minor binary versions.
